2001September 30, 2001

🇯🇵 Fukuoka, Japan

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Fukuoka, Japan, September 30, 2001 -- October 5, 2001

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2001-10-fukuoka-japan

17 Resolutions

521Plenary
Direct WG 11 to propose changes based on EXPRESS Edition 2 impact review
SC 4 requests WG 11 to circulate WG 11N179 to the full membership of the Working Group and to the Implementors for further review.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
520Plenary
Ask Secretariat to circulate Integrated Manufacturing Task Force report
SC 4 asks its secretariat to circulate the report of the Task Force on Integrated Manufacturing (N1214-N1216) to P-members, O-members, and Liaisons for comments and proposals for further requiremen...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
519Plenary
Urge review of IEC 62264-1, 2, and 3 (ISA SP95)
SC 4 respectfully urges its members to review carefully IEC 62264-1, 2 and 3 against the work of SC 4 and send their comments to Secretariat of ISO/TC 184.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
518Plenary
Request WG 11 to establish requirements for XML conformance testing
Following the completion of ISO 10303-28 edition 1, SC 4 asks WG 11 to establish the requirements for conformance testing of XML implementations of STEP conforming to ISO 10303-28 editions 1 and 2....
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
517Plenary
Urge coordination to harmonize ISO 10303-219, ISO 10303-238 and ISO 22093
SC 4 respectfully urges its members to coordinate their national experts on ISO 10303-219, ISO 10303-238, and other relevant STEP APs and ISO 22093 in order to avoid inconsistencies between these I...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
516Plenary
Establish policy for publication of SC 4 standards in HTML
SC 4 cancels Resolution 436 and establishes the following policy with regard to publication of standards in HTML.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
515Plenary
Direct WG 10 to assess Application Modules referencing IS Application Protocols
SC 4 directs WG 10, in cooperation with WG 3, JWG 9, WG 11, WG 12, and the Implementors Forum, to assess the feasibility of allowing Application Modules to accurately and unambiguously reference co...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
514Plenary
Authorize three-month ballot cycle for AP227ed2
SC 4 authorizes AP227 to use a three-month ballot cycle for the initial CD ballot of second and subsequent editions of the part.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
513Plenary
Appoint Matthew West as Deputy Convenor of WG 10
SC 4 appoints Matthew West as Deputy Convenor of WG 10 to serve for a period of three years.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
512Plenary
Create ad hoc group to assess ATA Spec 2000 Chapter 9 Bar Coding
SC 4 creates an ad hoc group to assess the proposal from the ATA to transpose the ATA Spec 2000 Chapter 9, Bar Coding, into an International Standard (IS).
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
511Plenary
Create ad hoc group to assess IAI IFC2x specification
SC 4 creates an ad hoc group to assess the proposal from the IAI to transpose the IFC2x platform into a Publicly Available Specification (PAS).
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
510Plenary
Amend Organization Handbook for Project Planning Requirements
SC 4 amends clause 2.3 of the Organization Handbook to define the NWI requirements for an accompanying work plan as follows: "The NWI shall contain a work plan identifying target dates for the foll...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
509Plenary
Approve new project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Project Leader |Editor |20542 Systems Engineering PAS | |Jim U'ren |===
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its deep appreciation to Mr. Christophe Viel for his efforts as WG 11 Convenor, his many project and technical contributions, and wishes him all the best for his future. His innovati...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere thanks to Chris Kreiler for his untiring efforts and excellent performance as acting Secretary before and during the meeting, in the absence of the regular secretariat. S...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
